ideas.name: imbalance_momentum
ideas.hypothesis: Order book imbalance predicts short-term price direction
ideas.rationale: When bid depth significantly exceeds ask depth, buying pressure tends to push price up within the next few ticks
ideas.risk_notes: Fails during large institutional block orders that create misleading imbalance

ideas.name: spread_mean_reversion
ideas.hypothesis: Spread widening indicates temporary liquidity withdrawal; price reverts when liquidity returns
ideas.rationale: Spread spikes are transient; providing liquidity during wide spreads captures the reversion
ideas.expected_direction: Wide spread + imbalance => fade the imbalance direction
ideas.risk_notes: Spread widening can be permanent during news events

ideas.name: trade_flow_pressure
ideas.hypothesis: Sustained one-directional trade flow indicates informed trading
ideas.rationale: When trade flow imbalance persists for multiple ticks, it signals informed order flow that will move the price
ideas.expected_direction: trade_flow > threshold => follow the flow direction
ideas.risk_notes: May chase momentum too late; needs exit discipline

selected_idea.name: spread_mean_reversion
selected_idea.hypothesis: Spread widening indicates temporary liquidity withdrawal; price reverts when liquidity returns
selected_idea.rationale: Spread spikes are transient; providing liquidity during wide spreads captures the reversion
selected_idea.expected_direction: Wide spread + imbalance => fade the imbalance direction
selected_idea.risk_notes: Spread widening can be permanent during news events

signal_rules.description: Fade bearish imbalance during wide spread (contrarian)
Fade bullish imbalance during wide spread (contrarian)

filters.description: No opportunity when spread is tight

exit_rules.description: Wider stop for mean reversion (20 bps)
Tighter target for mean reversion (10 bps)
Trailing stop at 8 bps from peak
